output.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT(COUNT(?country) + 1 AS ?rank) WHERE {
  wd:Q865 wdt:P2042 ?drcSize .
  ?country wdt:P30 wd:Q15 ; wdt:P2042 ?size .
  FILTER(?size > ?drcSize)
}
output.answer: The Democratic Republic of the Congo ranks 5th in military size among African nations.
output.formatted:
The Democratic Republic of the Congo ranks 5th in military size among African nations.

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT(COUNT(?country) + 1 AS ?rank) WHERE {
  wd:Q865 wdt:P2042 ?drcSize .
  ?country wdt:P30 wd:Q15 ; wdt:P2042 ?size .
  FILTER(?size > ?drcSize)
}
```
